workers.name: document-steppers
workers.task:
DOCUMENT STEPPERS — Multi-step form wizard for invoices + POs.

SCOPE
- New components: web-modern/src/components/wizard/{Stepper,StepperShell}.tsx (reusable wizard chrome: progress dots, back/next, validation summary, Lingui for every label).
- New route: web-modern/src/routes/app/documents/invoice-create/index.tsx (4-step invoice create flow: Customer → Line items → Review → Submit).
- New lib: web-modern/src/lib/wizard/{state,schemas}.ts (Zod-validated wizard state, step machine).
- Lingui: every user-facing string (~15 strings: step titles, button labels, validation errors, success message).
- e2e: web-modern/e2e/document-steppers.spec.ts — open invoice-create, walk all 4 steps, go back, fix validation, submit.

HARD RULES (per 10.4 + 10.5-r1 playbook)
- pnpm install only
- Compose 10.4 primitives (DataTable for line items in step 2 if applicable; otherwise pure form)
- Lingui macros for everything user-facing
- 5 pre-existing failures (4 fleet + 1 AppLauncher): do NOT touch
- Run pnpm typecheck, pnpm vitest run, pnpm build, pnpm i18n:extract and confirm clean (same 5 pre-existing failures expected)
- The 10.3 locale switcher and 10.5-pre 'translations-in-progress' gate must remain unchanged
- Commit with no literal 'verify' substring
- Write status.md at .orchestration/phase10-5-product-differentiators-r2/document-steppers/status.md with STATUS: PASS

VERIFY BEFORE COMMITTING
- pnpm typecheck -> 0 errors
- pnpm vitest run -> 2349+N passed / 5 pre-existing
- pnpm build -> success, 3 per-locale chunks
- pnpm i18n:extract -> idempotent
- grep -rE 'useLingui|<Trans|t\`' web-modern/src/routes/app/documents/invoice-create web-modern/src/lib/wizard web-modern/src/components/wizard | wc -l -> >= 10
- grep -rE 'locale-switcher|i18n-translations-in-progress' web-modern/dist/assets/ | wc -l -> 0 (prod-stripped)

BRANCH NAME: wip/phase10-5-product-differentiators-r2/document-steppers (slash preserved)
COMMIT: feat(document-steppers): Phase 10.5 r2 W5 multi-step form wizard
PUSH: git push ant wip/phase10-5-product-differentiators-r2/document-steppers

SELF-SEQUENCING: This worker can start immediately. No pre-conditions.

workers.name: keyboard-grammar
workers.task:
KEYBOARD GRAMMAR — Cross-feature keymap (cmd-K, esc-to-close, etc).

PRE-CONDITION: Wait until W5 (document-steppers) is merged into ant/main. Poll `git fetch ant && git log --oneline ant/main | grep document-steppers` once per 5 min. Once the merge commit is visible, you may begin. The orchestrator has dispatched you in parallel with W5; you do the work AFTER W5 lands.

SCOPE
- New lib: web-modern/src/lib/keyboard/{registry,grammar,shortcuts,schemas}.ts (Zod-validated keymap grammar, registerShortcut / unregisterShortcut / parseChord APIs, feature scopes).
- New components: web-modern/src/components/keyboard/{KeyHandler,ShortcutCheatsheet}.tsx (KeyHandler mounts in app shell; Cheatsheet is a PeekPanel that shows grouped shortcuts).
- Lingui: ~12 strings for the cheatsheet (group titles: 'Navigation', 'Actions', etc; shortcut descriptions).
- e2e: web-modern/e2e/keyboard-grammar.spec.ts — open cheatsheet via '?', navigate via j/k, close via esc.
- Wire KeyHandler into the AppLayout shell (similar to how ask-ai W3 added the Topbar toggle).

HARD RULES
- pnpm install only
- Lingui macros for everything user-facing
- 5 pre-existing failures: do NOT touch
- Audit gates clean
- Status: .orchestration/phase10-5-product-differentiators-r2/keyboard-grammar/status.md

VERIFY BEFORE COMMITTING
- All 4 audit gates green
- grep Lingui count >= 12
- prod bundle clean
- Test the keymap against at least 2 different r1 routes (fiscal-gates + triage-inbox) to confirm DataTable row-selection state is keyboard-accessible

BRANCH / COMMIT / PUSH — swap name
SELF-SEQUENCING: Poll ant/main for the W5 merge commit before starting code.

workers.name: onboarding
workers.task:
ONBOARDING — First-run tour overlay. 5 default tours for the 5 differentiator surfaces.

PRE-CONDITION: Wait until BOTH W5 (document-steppers) AND W6 (keyboard-grammar) are merged into ant/main. The 5 tours reference surfaces from r1 + r2.

SCOPE
- New components: web-modern/src/components/onboarding/{TourOverlay,useTour,OnboardingLauncher}.{tsx,hook} (overlay chrome, state hook, launcher button in Topbar).
- New lib: web-modern/src/lib/onboarding/{tours,state,schemas}.ts (5 default tour defs, localStorage persistence 'a1:tour:<id>:done', Zod schemas).
- 5 default tours:
  1. fiscal-gates: 'Mark a gate as filed' (3 steps: open route → select gate → click Mark filed)
  2. triage-inbox: 'Resolve an overdue item' (3 steps: open route → click row → Mark resolved)
  3. ask-ai: 'Ask a question' (2 steps: open panel → type + submit)
  4. documents: 'Create an invoice' (4 steps: open invoice-create → fill steps → submit) — uses W5
  5. settings: 'Switch locale' (2 steps: open locale switcher → pick ru) — uses W6 (cmd-K to open cheatsheet)
- Lingui: every step title + body + button label (~25 strings total)
- e2e: web-modern/e2e/onboarding.spec.ts — first-run launches the tour, advance, back, skip

HARD RULES
- pnpm install only
- Lingui macros
- 5 pre-existing failures: do NOT touch
- Audit gates clean
- Status: .orchestration/phase10-5-product-differentiators-r2/onboarding/status.md

VERIFY BEFORE COMMITTING
- All 4 audit gates green
- grep Lingui count >= 20
- prod bundle clean
- Topbar Launcher button is in all 5 surfaces (or launches all 5 tours from a single menu)

BRANCH / COMMIT / PUSH — swap name
SELF-SEQUENCING: Poll ant/main for the W5+W6 merge commits before starting code.
